logHeldPendingKey: {{count}} incoming intent(s) waiting for your sync passphrase to unlock
vaultTransportNote: Reuses your GLANCEvault connection from Cloud Sync — no extra credentials, always encrypted.
vaultNotConfigured: GLANCEvault isn't set up yet. Configure it in Cloud Sync first, then intents will deliver over the vault.
directoryNotFound: Events directory not found (404). Create it first: {{path}}
encryptionNote: Uses your cloud sync passphrase. Set up once; remains active across sessions.
encryptionEnabled: Encryption enabled. Passphrase not stored — not needed again on this device.
integrationNote: lifeGLANCE and dayGLANCE must share the same delivery mechanism (the same WebDAV endpoint + events path, or the same GLANCEvault account). Milestones you mark "track as dayGLANCE Goal" will appear as goals in dayGLANCE; Goal completions and date changes sync back here.
toastGoalDeleted: dayGLANCE Goal deleted — "{{title}}" still exists here.
